Vikram [...] To put it simply, all of the above and a little more.

End-to-end, our agents are designed specifically for these types of interactions, from the distribution capabilities and the ability to be an always on surface for insight ; to in-session behavior. We provide a stablished performance baseline. The agents are designed to improve the likelihood of reaching the user's set objective while allowing enough flexibility to identify what isn't being thought of beforehand.

Added to this, it runs full circle from a UX perspective by giving you the ability to dynamically route users to actions or rewards based on the interaction. [...] Miguel Fierro M

@ilyaforfun Hi there Ilya!   
  
You can try it yourself. Have a look at the demo or even better, you can create a Free account and build your first agent in a minute or two.   
  
Thanks for the comment and feel free to reach out if you have any other questions.

Miguel Fierro M

If you want to check out the demo here's the link.
